description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a slightly flared profile, giving it a modern and sturdy appearance. The front features five open shelves, each evenly spaced and bordered by thick, angled side panels. The sides of the unit are accented with metallic brackets or handles, adding both structural reinforcement and a touch of industrial style. The back panel is solid and vertically grooved, matching the wood grain texture seen throughout the piece. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing additional items or decor. The overall finish is a dark brown wood with subtle grain patterns, complemented by metallic accents at the base and sides.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with five open shelves, flared sides, and metallic side accents. The design is modern and sturdy, with a broad top and solid back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves framed by angled side panels and a broad top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical wood grain, metallic brackets, and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, vertically grooved wood panel with no visible shelves or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the metallic brackets and wood grain seen on the other side.
